stemHtml: In which weather conditions shall the vertical visibility (VV) be reported in a METAR?

options.a: Whenever the RVR is below 550 m.
options.b: At all times when the airfield is under IMC.
options.c: When it is not possible to determine the height of the cloud base.
options.d: Whenever a pilot is able to report the vertical visibility down from an aircraft.
